_meta.description: NEXUS 프로젝트 목록 — 훅 활성화 + 공유 링크 기준 정리

TECS-L.description: Discovering universal rules. Perfect number 6 → mathematics of the cosmos → multi-engine architecture → consciousness continuity. 150 characterizations + 8 Major Discoveries + 156 tools

anima.description: Consciousness implementation. PureField repulsion-field engine + Hexad 6-module architecture (C/D/S/M/W/E) + 1030 laws + 20 Meta Laws + Rust backend. ConsciousDecoderV2 (34.5M) + 10D consciousness vector + 12-faction debate + Φ ratchet

canon.description: Architecture from perfect number 6. 112 AI techniques + semiconductor chip design + network/crypto/OS/display patterns. σ(n)·φ(n)=n·τ(n), n=6 → universal design principles. NEXUS Discovery Engine: Rust CLI — telescope 400 lenses + OUROBOROS evolution + discovery graph + verifier + 1116 tests (was: n6-architecture, renamed 2026-05-07)

nexus.description: Central Discovery Engine & Infrastructure Hub. 400 lenses + shared infra + singularity cycle + alien index

sedi.description: Search for Extra-Dimensional Intelligence. Hunting for traces of extraterrestrial/extra-dimensional intelligence through n=6 signal patterns. 77 data sources (SETI, LIGO, CMB, Breakthrough Listen, Exoplanet) + R-spectrum receiver + 678 hypotheses

hexa-lang.description: The Perfect Number Programming Language. Every constant from n=6: 53 keywords (σ·τ+sopfr), 24 operators (J₂), 8 primitives (σ-τ), 6-phase pipeline, Egyptian memory (1/2+1/3+1/6=1). DSE v2: 21,952 combos, 100% n6 EXACT. Working compiler + REPL

papers.description: Complete paper collection (98 papers). Published on Zenodo with DOIs. TECS-L+N6 (33) + anima (39) + SEDI (20). Browse online
